response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive software development experience and has contributed to developer tooling, but his background lacks clear evidence of people management or organizational change leadership. His technical expertise in build systems, testing, and developer tools aligns well with the role, but the absence of explicit management experience is a notable gap.
strengths: Strong technical leadership in developer tools, build systems, and testing infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, GISCollective platform).
Diverse experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, with a focus on testable and high-quality code.
Proven ability to contribute hands-on to complex technical problems and mentor others (e.g., workshops, open-source projects).
concerns: No explicit people management experience; leadership roles appear technical rather than managerial.
Lacks evidence of setting team priorities, performance expectations, or organizational change leadership.
Mobile-platform knowledge is limited, with most experience in web and general software development.
